profile.migrationPattern: Not a Migrant (Stays in One Area)
profile.iucnHabitatDetail: Wetlands (inland) - Permanent Freshwater Lakes (over 8ha); Wetlands (inland) - Permanent Rivers/Streams/Creeks (includes waterfalls); Wetlands (inland) - Seasonal/Intermittent/Irregular Rivers/Streams/Creeks; Wetlands (inland) - Karst and Other Subterranean Hydrological Systems (inland); Wetlands (inland) - Permanent Inland Deltas; Marine Neritic - Estuaries; Marine Intertidal - Sandy Shoreline and/or Beaches, Sand Bars, Spits, Etc; Artificial/Aquatic - Water Storage Areas (over 8ha); Artificial/Aquatic - Ponds (below 8ha); Marine Coastal/Supratidal - Coastal Brackish/Saline Lagoons/Marine Lakes; Marine Intertidal - Mangrove Submerged Roots
profile.nativeCountries: Cameroon, Angola, Tanzania, United Republic of, Namibia, Egypt, Congo, The Democratic Republic of the, Eritrea, Rwanda, Equatorial aesidentalis, Ethiopia, Congo, Zimbabwe, Zambia, Eswatini, Burundi, Madagascar, Gabon, South Africa, Botswana, Kenya, Sudan, Malawi, Mozambique, Somalia, Uganda, South Sudan
